description_long: A young adult woman stands confidently, making a peace sign with her right hand while her left hand rests on her hip. She wears a cropped t-shirt with a bold graphic print, paired with short athletic shorts and high-top sneakers. Her hair is styled in a neat ponytail, and her midriff is exposed, suggesting a casual, sporty look. The figure's posture is relaxed yet expressive, with a slight tilt in her hips and a playful demeanor. The clothing fits snugly, emphasizing an athletic build, and the shoes feature contrasting accents. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is that of a modern urban pedestrian.
description: A young woman in sporty casual attire stands making a peace sign, with a confident and relaxed posture. She wears a cropped t-shirt, athletic shorts, and high-top sneakers, with her hair in a ponytail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the peace sign gesture, graphic t-shirt, exposed midriff, and confident facial expression.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ponytail, profile of the face, and the relaxed arm on the hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ponytail, back of the t-shirt and shorts, and the peace sign from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm bent for the peace sign and the side profile of the body and face.
attribute_clothing_type: cropped graphic t-shirt and athletic shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with one hand making a peace sign and the other on the hip
